character_dossiers.name: I
character_dossiers.biography: A sailor navigating a ship in distress, cutting halyards to save the vessel, and wading ashore after abandoning the ship. Later, navigating through woods toward a stockade and encountering a fire suspected to be related to a campsite.

character_dossiers.name: Captain Smollett
character_dossiers.biography: A captain whose orders dictate frugality with firewood. His men are described as adhering to his instructions regarding resource management.

character_dossiers.name: Ben Gunn
character_dossiers.biography: A maroon encountered in the woods. The narrator avoids him cautiously, suggesting prior interaction.

character_dossiers.name: Silver
character_dossiers.biography: A leader camped among marshes, whose presence is inferred through the narrator's caution about being seen.
